message:
bd-1sxo: Implement model_validate() with all options

Add Pydantic-style model validation functionality:

- ValidateInput enum: supports Dict, Json, and JsonValue inputs
- ValidateOptions struct: strict, from_attributes, context, update
- ModelValidate trait: blanket impl for DeserializeOwned types
- value_to_json(): convert Value enum to serde_json::Value

Features:
- model_validate(): create models from various inputs with validation
- model_validate_json(): convenience for JSON string input
- model_validate_dict(): convenience for HashMap input
- Supports merging update values after parsing
- Proper error handling with ValidationError

Tests:
- test_model_validate_from_json
- test_model_validate_from_json_value
- test_model_validate_from_dict
- test_model_validate_invalid_json
- test_model_validate_malformed_json
- test_model_validate_with_update
- test_model_validate_strict_mode
- test_validate_options_builder
- test_validate_input_from_conversions
- test_value_to_json_conversions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
